home.select_file: Select a CSV or XLSX file
home.drop_file: Drag and drop a CSV or XLSX file here

data.title: Get the most out of your data!

cross_platform.title: The full power of Exlser, on every device

works.empty: Here will be shown your list of works
works.delete_message: This will remove the dataset, schema, rows, and file reference.

error.open_failed: Could not open the selected dataset.
error.delete_failed: Could not delete the selected dataset.

workspace.title: Dataset workspace
workspace.visible_columns_hint: Hide columns you do not need in the table and exports.

qr.unavailable: This row is too large for a QR code.

workspace.no_tables: This dataset has no sheets to display.
workspace.no_rows: No rows available for this sheet.

filters.title: Filters
filters.invalid_value: Enter a valid value for the selected column type.
filters.no_range: No numeric values are available in the loaded rows.

query.title: Read-only query
query.intro: Write a SELECT query for advanced analysis. Only read-only queries are allowed and results are limited.
query.active_context: Use sheet as an alias for the current sheet: {table}
query.empty_result: Run a query to show results here.

errors.empty: Write a SELECT query before running it.
errors.unsafe_statement: This query contains a blocked SQL command.
errors.multiple_statements: Run one SELECT query at a time without comments or semicolons.
errors.unknown_table: Use only tables that belong to this dataset.

error.load_failed: Could not load the dataset workspace.
error.sheet_failed: Could not load the selected sheet.
error.pagination_failed: Could not load the requested page.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.no_chart: No chart available for the current data types.

error_messages.invalid_aggregation: Select a numeric value column to use this aggregation.
error_messages.no_rows_after_filter: No rows match the current filters.
error_messages.unsupported: This chart is not available for the selected columns.
error_messages.internal: This chart could not be loaded. Try changing columns or filters.
error_messages.no_numeric_column: Select a numeric column to draw this chart.

line.title: Trend over time
line.description: Uses a date column and a numeric value to show how values change over time.

bar.title: Category comparison
bar.description: Compares groups using a count or a numeric value.

pie.title: Share by category
pie.description: Shows how a total is split across a small number of groups.

aggregation_info.title: Aggregations
aggregation_info.intro: Aggregation controls how multiple rows are combined before the chart is drawn. If each group contains one row, sum, average, minimum, and maximum can look identical.
aggregation_info.count: Number of rows in each group.
aggregation_info.sum: Total of the selected numeric values.
aggregation_info.min: Lowest value found in each group.
aggregation_info.max: Highest value found in each group.

info.title: Data types
info.intro: The data type tells the app how to interpret and store the values in this column. You can keep the detected type or change it before creating the dataset.
info.text: Text: words, codes, IDs, notes, or mixed values.
info.real: Real: numbers with decimals or monetary values.
info.boolean: Boolean: true/false, yes/no, or similar binary values.
info.date: Date: dates that should be handled as calendar values.

error.empty_file_name: The selected file has no name. Select the file again.
error.empty_file_path: The app cannot access the selected file path. Select the file again.
error.empty_file_bytes: The selected file is empty or unavailable. Select the file again.
error.no_extension: The selected file has no extension. Use a CSV or XLSX file.
error.unsupported_format: This file format is not supported. Use a CSV or XLSX file. Legacy XLS files are not supported yet.
error.parser_not_found: The app cannot read this file type yet. Use a CSV or XLSX file.
error.parsing_failed: The file could not be read. Check that it is not corrupted or password-protected.
error.no_sheets: No readable sheets were found in the file.
error.no_valid_sheets: The file was read, but no sheet contains usable tabular data.
error.schema_failed: The app could not detect a usable table structure in the file.
error.unexpected_error: Something went wrong during import. Try again or select another file.
error.creation_failed: The dataset could not be created. Review the import settings and try again.
